message:
fix(storage): preserve FIFO order in coalescer spill drain, scope commit locks, and harden input validation

Coalescer spill drain: Only drain spill files when the in-memory queue is
completely empty. Previously, spill entries could be drained while the
main queue still had items, violating FIFO ordering and potentially
processing commits out of sequence.

commit_lock_path: Make commit locks project-scoped when all rel_paths
belong to the same project. Instead of always using a single repo-wide
.commit.lock, paths under projects/<slug>/... now get a per-project lock
at projects/<slug>/.commit.lock. This reduces lock contention when
multiple agents work in different projects within the same repo.

heal_archive_locks: Replace manual string slicing with strip_suffix() for
extracting lock names from .owner.json files. The previous code would
panic on unexpected file name lengths.

emit_notification_signal: Add validation for empty/whitespace-only
project_slug and agent_name values. Previously only path traversal
characters were checked, but empty strings could create signals at
unexpected filesystem locations.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
